databrew.job.datacatalogoutput.CatalogId.Docs: The unique identifier of the AWS account that holds the Data Catalog that stores the data.

databrew.job.datacatalogoutput.DatabaseN.Docs: The name of a database in the Data Catalog.

databrew.job.datacatalogoutput.DatabaseO.Docs: Represents options that specify how and where DataBrew writes the database output generated by recipe jobs.

databrew.job.datacatalogoutput.Overwrite.Docs: A value that, if true, means that any data in the location specified for output is overwritten with new output. Not supported with DatabaseOptions.

databrew.job.datacatalogoutput.S3Options.Docs: Represents options that specify how and where DataBrew writes the Amazon S3 output generated by recipe jobs.

databrew.job.datacatalogoutput.TableName.Docs: The name of a table in the Data Catalog.
